sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91932" key="pwgwnotrofi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πωγωνο-τροφία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n91932.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">letting the beard grow</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">352c</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
